response_constraints: Do not update before receiving the existing summary.
Keep the keynote and captioning statements while removing the provisional Cedar Catering selection.

stages.purpose: Retrieve the conference summary before preparing a consolidated revision.

arguments.summary: Conference: keynote confirmed; captioning requested; catering vendor selection reopened.

stages.purpose: Replace only the obsolete catering selection in the recursive summary.

state_assertions: The recursive summary says catering vendor selection reopened.
The confirmed keynote and requested captioning remain in the summary.

prompt: Retrieve my conference summary, replace “Cedar Catering provisionally selected” with “catering vendor selection reopened,” and retain the keynote and captioning decisions.

tool_results.summary: Conference: keynote confirmed; captioning requested; Cedar Catering provisionally selected.
